definitions: Sofia Palaganas is an American fashion designer known for her work in luxury womenswear and bridal fashion. She is recognized for her intricate designs, use of high-quality fabrics, and modern aesthetic.
Sofia Palaganas is the founder and creative director of her eponymous fashion label, which specializes in custom couture and ready-to-wear collections.
examples: Sofia Palaganas unveiled her latest collection at New York Fashion Week.
The gown worn by the celebrity was a custom design by Sofia Palaganas.
Fashion enthusiasts eagerly anticipate new releases from Sofia Palaganas.
